m_Item1.QuestionText: One of the major drawback of B-Tree is the difficulty of traversing the keys sequentially.
Time complexities of three algorithms are given. Which should execute the slowest for large values of N ?
How many nodes in a tree have no ancestors.
m_Item1.Explanation:
Ancestor of node 9 are 7,3 and 1
Ancestor of node 6 are 3 and 1
Ancestor of node 5 are 2 and 1
but root node has no ancestor so answer is 1

m_Item1.QuestionText: A full binary tree with n leaves contains
If a node in a BST has two children, then its inorder predecessor has
The number of different directed trees with 3 nodes are
m_Item1.Explanation:
This is because the there are 3 possible ways of putting one of the trees first. Then, since you have 2 trees left to order there are 2 ways of putting one of the trees second and then there is only one tree left and only one place to put it.
So is 3*2 = 6
